scripts.download-fonts: mkdir -p public/fonts && curl -fsSL -o public/fonts/CrimsonText-Regular.ttf 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/google/fonts/main/ofl/crimsontext/CrimsonText-Regular.ttf' && curl -fsSL -o public/fonts/Lato-Regular.ttf 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/google/fonts/main/ofl/lato/Lato-Regular.ttf'
